data.content: Context: follow-up to commit d296525e, which clarified managed skill lease lifecycle but simplified the wording too far. Correct the agent-facing guidance so normal CLI claim leases are still treated as action-scoped and spent by `kno next`/rollback, while MCP session leases are documented as a distinct path that may return to `lease_ready` for session reuse. Do not change runtime lease semantics unless the audit finds a real mismatch; update managed skill templates and regression tests.
